name: Shells
tooltip: <D>> Dominant foundation specific, activates after killing an enemy:</>
<D>BISON</>
<F1>> Combat Focus: </><C>50%</> increased weapon accuracy and <C>25%</> increased speed and dexterity for <C>5 s</> on receiving direct vitals damage, <C>10 s</> cooldown
<F2>> Flow State: </>Core activates without cost for <C>2.5 s</> on performing a wall dive or flip within <C>1 s</> of starting a climb, <C>15 s</> cooldown
<F3>> Locked In: </>Melee and firearm damage gains <C>0-50%</> defense bypass proportional to remaining vitals, from <C>100-25%</>
<D>DRAGON</>
<F1>> Thermal Transfer: </><C>50%</> of defense gained from Backdraft or Burn and explosive damage received is restored to vitals
<F2>> Superheated: </>Backdraft and Ground Slam gain <C>25%</> increased damage and range. Backdraft, Ground Slam and backup weapon damage applies Burn+
<F3>> Crossfeed: </>Aerial maneuvers and hover no longer drain aux power or consume charges for <C>5 s</> on receiving chemical heal
<D>GHOST</>
<F1>> Safety Measures: </>Gain <C>25</> temporary defense during Opportunity, clear Burn on camouflage activation, <C>50%</> reduced explosive damage received while camouflage active
<F2>> Hidden Asset: </>Interacting no longer deactivates camouflage. Deep camouflage no longer stuns on taking damage, is undetectable while active and gains enhanced vision
<F3>> Shadow Operative: </>Hip firing supressed firearms, attacking with backup weapons and throwing devices no longer deactivates camouflage
<D>HYDRA</>
<F1>> Overstimulated: </>Gain an Adrenal Feedback stack every <C>30 s</>, increases maximum stacks by <C>5</>
<F2>> Feedback Loop: </>All visible kills while Core active gain an Adrenal Feedback stack. Reaching <C>5</> stacks fully restores defense and Core charge
<F3>> Post-Kill Clarity: </>Gain enhanced vision and firearms and backup weapons bypass all damage reductions for <C>5 s</> on kill, duration extended while dealing damage, <C>10 s</> cooldown
<D>RHINO</>
<F1>> Power Relay: </><C>30 /s</> uninterruptible defense, max defense and aux power regeneration while Disabled. Gain Overcharge during active Core if activated while Disabled or Overcharged
<F2>> Force Trauma: </>Shockwave gains <C>50%</> increased range, debuff duration and knockback force, applies Disable+ and Snare+

<F3>> Reverberate: </>Backup weapon damage applies Disable for <C>2 s</> and deals <C>0-25%</> additional shock damage proportional to remaining defense, from <C>0-50%</>. Overcharge for <C>5 s</> on melee or body impact kill
